lessons.title: Databases in Node.js – SQL vs NoSQL
lessons.description: Understand the landscape of databases and how Node connects to them.

lessons.title: MongoDB and Mongoose – Connecting and Modeling
lessons.description: Connect to MongoDB, define schemas, and create models with Mongoose.

lessons.title: CRUD Operations with Mongoose
lessons.description: Perform Create, Read, Update, Delete operations using Mongoose models.

lessons.title: SQL Databases – Using SQLite3
lessons.description: Connect to a SQLite database and run raw SQL queries.

lessons.title: Introduction to ORMs – Sequelize
lessons.description: Simplify SQL with an ORM: define models and query with Sequelize.
